betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Exploring Structures§f

§aSearch the world for valuable loot, machines, and resources hidden in HBM structures.§f

HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod adds dozens of unique structures that generate throughout the world. They contain essential early-game items like steel, circuits, diesel, and even entire machines.

§6Land Structures§f:
§b• Radio Station§f: Two-story cement building with starter loot
§b• Broadcasting Tower§f: Tall tower with steel, red copper, and tungsten blocks
§b• Satellite Dish§f: Control center underneath with highly valuable loot
§b• Factory§f: Contains starter loot, machines, and resources
§b• Bunker§f: Sprawling underground complex, hard to spot from surface
§b• Office Building§f: Three-story building in flat biomes
§b• Library Dungeon§f: Underground structure similar to vanilla dungeons
§b• Crashed Spaceship§f: Early-game loot in a crashed vehicle
§b• Antenna§f: Deco blocks with a loot chest

§6Desert Structures§f:
§b• Desert Atom (Nuclear Plant in Desert)§f: §cHIGHLY RADIOACTIVE§f — avoid without protection!
§b• Ancient Pyramid§f: Nuclear waste isolation site
§b• Crashed Vertibird§f: Two loot chests near the crash

§6Ocean Structures§f:
§b• Oil Rig§f: Huge structure with drilling superstructure
§b• Aircraft Carrier§f: Sunken ship with angled flight deck
§b• Lighthouse§f: Contains weak RTG fuel in the basement

§6Jungle Structures§f:
§b• Enargite Temple§f: Unique structure under jungle canopies

§cSafety Warning§f: Do NOT enter the Desert Atom (nuclear reactor compound) without radiation protection. The entire site is lethally radioactive.

§eTip§f: Antennas and Radio stations are the most common and safest early structures. Look for them on the surface in plains and forest biomes.
